creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
glarkin     2010-04-15 17:48:25 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/php-plurk-api    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    www/php-plurk-api/files pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  Plurk is a popular Internet service, and many applications are
  designed for Plurk, including mobile and desktop applications.
  
  This is the PHP Plurk API client for interacting with the Plurk
  Internet service.
  
  WWW:    http://code.google.com/p/php-plurk-api/
  
  PR:             ports/144308
  Submitted by:   Bo-Yi Wu <appleboy.tw at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2598    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +48 -0     ports/www/php-plurk-api/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/php-plurk-api/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +35 -0     ports/www/php-plurk-api/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/www/php-plurk-api/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +84 -0     ports/www/php-plurk-api/pkg-plist (new)
